title: DimensionEvent
description: Emitted to report a change in a business dimension count (e.g. PlantPal's plant count). Consumed by Treasury for business-dimension metering and threshold enforcement (D024, D027).

eventId.description: Unique event identifier for idempotent consumption

appId.description: Functional identifier of the app reporting the dimension change

userId.description: End-user identifier within the app (attribution only)

dimensionKey.description: Name of the business dimension being counted

delta.description: Signed change to apply to the running count (positive on create, negative on soft-delete)

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the dimension change occurred
